questions.question: Peter says inner beauty is more valuable than what?
options: Outward adornment like braided hair and gold jewelry
questions.correct: Outward adornment like braided hair and gold jewelry
questions.feedback: Beauty should not come from outward adornment but from the inner self.

questions.question: Peter says believers should always be prepared to give an answer for what?
questions.feedback: Always be prepared to give an answer for the hope that you have.

questions.question: Peter says it is better to suffer for doing good than for doing evil.
questions.feedback: It is better to suffer for doing good, if that is God's will, than for doing evil.

questions.question: In your hearts revere Christ as _____.
questions.feedback: In your hearts revere Christ as Lord.

questions.question: Do not repay evil with evil or insult with insult, but with a _____.
questions.feedback: Do not repay evil with evil or insult with insult, but with blessing.
